title: wilckia patula
intro: Wilckia patula, also known as the Polyscias mollis or Guanabano, is a tropical plant species native to the Pacific Islands. It is a climber or shrub with heart-shaped leaves and has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine. The plant is known for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate various health issues such as fever, pain, and respiratory problems. The leaves and stems of the Wilckia patula can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
